summary: Frontend testing for BidBlitz Super App - Dashboard Sponsored Ads Banner fully tested and working. Admin Dashboard requires admin authentication and could not be UI tested, but code review confirms correct implementation.
action_items: Admin Dashboard (/app-admin) requires admin login - provide test admin credentials for future testing
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ SuperAppMinimal.jsx: Sponsored Ads Banner implementation correct
✓ 4 ads defined: Restaurant (20% Discount), Taxi (10 Coins Cashback), Games Tournament, VIP (50% Off)
✓ Pagination dots correctly mapped to ad indices
✓ 6 stat cards: Total Users, Total Coins, Taxi Rides, Games Played, Marketplace Sales, Revenue
✓ Live Activity Feed with 8 activity templates and 10 user names
✓ Coin Management form with User ID input, Add/Remove buttons, Amount input, Submit button
✓ All form elements have data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 50% - Dashboard Ads tested, Admin Dashboard requires auth

Code review confirms all features implemented correctly. MOCKED APIs: Stats and Activity Feed use frontend mock data as fallback, Ads are static frontend data.
